content: Curiosity-driven autonomous agents (from Topic A) can resolve the persistent `recency bias plaguing 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems (from Topic B) by tagging low-uncertainty exploratory memories as high-priority for long-term retention, rather than only retaining only the most recent or high-reward memories. This creates a self-organizing memory schema that grows more robust over time as the agent’s own curiosity guides what it stores.
